title: Women’s 2017 pre-season tune up clinics
excerpt: Club-pro Julie Multamaki will be running 2 x 6-week pre-season training programs starting Saturday, September 30th – November 4th to get you up and ready for Interclub season. Also due to popular demand, there is an additional 4-week program on Sundays from October 1st – October 22nd. Times: Saturdays: 10:30-12:00 pm – for ladies in LL3 … Read more
content:
Club-pro Julie Multamaki will be running 2 x 6-week pre-season training programs starting Saturday, September 30th – November 4th to get you up and ready for Interclub season. Also due to popular demand, there is an additional 4-week program on Sundays from October 1st – October 22nd.

Times:

Saturdays:

10:30-12:00 pm – for ladies in LL3 interclub (or similar ability). This clinic will focus on 1,2 & 3 person drills, conditioning, basic strategy & basic movement skills in preparation for the upcoming interclub season.

12:00pm-1:30pm – for ladies in LL2 & LL1 interclub (or similar ability). The focus will be on 2-3 person drills, strength & conditioning, and match tactics and strategies, in preparation for the upcoming interclub season.

Sunday:

12:00pm-1:30pm – for ladies in LL1-LL3 interclub (or similar ability). This clinic will focus on drills, conditioning, basic strategy & basic movement skills in preparation for the upcoming interclub season. Julie will pair you with someone of similar ability to do the drills with, and the “difficulty” of the drills will be determined by each partnership’s ability levels as well.

Costs:   

Member Cost: $90.00 + gst ($60.00 + gst for 4-week Sunday course)

Non-Member Cost: $120.00 + gst ($85.00 + gst for 4-week Sunday course). Includes clinic & entrance fees

Other details:

Minimum # Participants: 6

Maximum # Participants: 8

Registration Deadline: September 28th, 2017 at 6 pm

Coach: Julie Multamaki 

To register please visit: https://ts2.clubinterconnect.com/edmonton/home/reportView.do?id=201&camptypeid=23 or call the front desk if you run into any problems

Contact please contact Julie at multamaki@yahoo.com should you have any questions. If you are unable to attend this time but are interested in future clinics please let Julie know.
